IApiServerStateBeginRequest Method

One Identity Manager API Server
Notifies the server about a new request being processed.

Namespace:  QBM.CompositionApi.ApiManager
Assembly:  QBM.CompositionApi.Server (in QBM.CompositionApi.Server.dll) Version: 9.3 v93-311513
Syntax
C#
Copy
IDisposable BeginRequest(
	out bool unavailable
)

Parameters

unavailable
Type: SystemBoolean

Return Value

Type: IDisposable
A disposable object that must be disposed when the request ends processing.
